zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Salerne於1379年出生在英國英格蘭素可易德時，她的父親John Salerne27歲，母親Agnes11376歲。她和William Cheyne至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1424年在英國英格蘭享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Salerne于1379年出生在英国英格兰素可易德时，她的父亲John Salerne27岁，母亲Agnes11376岁。她和William Cheyne至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1424年在英国英格兰享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Salerne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Sal, Salvatore, Pasquale, Carmine, Rocco, Aldo, Nunzio, Enrico, Francesco, Gaspare.
Italian (southern): habitational name from the city of Salerno in Campania.

variants.name: Salierno
meanings: Italian (mainly Campania): variant with metaphony of   Salerno  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Salerne was born in 1379, in Iden, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Salerne, was 27 and her mother, Agnes, was 11376. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with William Cheyne. She died in 1424, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Salerne est née en 1379, à Iden, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Salerne, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 11376 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec William Cheyne. Elle est décédée en 1424, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Salerne 1379 in Iden, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Salerne 27 und ihre Mutter Agnes 11376. Sie hatte mit William Cheyne mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1424 im Alter von 45 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Salerne è nata il nel 1379 nel Iden, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Salerne, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 11376 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con William Cheyne. Morì nel 1424, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Salerneが1379年にイギリスイギリススセックスイデンで生まれた時，父John Salerneは27歳，母Agnesは11376歳であった。彼女はWilliam Cheyneとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1424年にイギリスイギリスで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Salerne(이)가 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 이든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Salerne(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 11376세였다. 그녀는 William Cheyne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Salerne nasceu em 1379, em Iden, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Salerne, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 11376 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com William Cheyne. Ela faleceu em 1424, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Salerne родилась в 1379 г. в местности иден, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Salerne было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 11376. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от William Cheyne. Она умерла в 1424 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Salerne nació en 1379, en Iden, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Salerne, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 11376 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con William Cheyne. Murió en 1424, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
